verdict: MAPEADO (sem janela cooperativa; criacao so a lambda~0, rho alto)
statement: The plane is mapped and there is NO cooperative window: survival is highest at lambda_p~0 (= CR_GAUGE) and high rho (the marginal, ill-posed creation of G3), and raising lambda_p only SUPPRESSES it (the Wilson term penalises the y-structured created core). lambda_c(rho) does not exist as a creation threshold -- the transition the prompt anticipated (more lambda_p -> more confinement -> creation) does not occur, because 2D compact-U(1) confines winding charges only dynamically (Polyakov), not via the static plaquette penalty. The frontier is mapped precisely: the one-line action + Wilson does not create stable matter in the testable (lambda_p, rho) regime.
